selectLanguage: Let's select language first, so we can better understand each other :)

kvarum.subtitle: Event scheduling platform connecting speakers and their audience
kvarum.description: A full-featured scheduling platform that bridges the gap between educators and their audience. Supports complex timezone scenarios, real-time calendar synchronization, and multi-channel notifications.
kvarum.goal: Enable seamless scheduling between expert speakers and their listeners, with real-time availability tracking and straightforward communication tools.
kvarum.solution: Built a responsive frontend with WebSocket-powered real-time updates, multiple calendar views, and a notification engine to keep all participants synchronized across devices.

bus-tracker.subtitle: Schedule-based bus location tracker for cities without GPS transit
bus-tracker.description: Public transit in my city lacks GPS equipment, making real-time bus tracking impossible. This platform estimates bus positions using schedule data and historical patterns, giving commuters a reliable alternative.
bus-tracker.goal: Provide commuters with accurate, real-time bus location estimates in a city where public transit lacks GPS tracking.
bus-tracker.solution: Developed a position-interpolation algorithm using GTFS static data and transit patterns, visualized through an optimized Leaflet map interface with live delay compensation.

craftistry.subtitle: E-commerce marketplace for independent artisans and handmade goods
craftistry.description: A specialized e-commerce platform built for independent artisans. Features a customizable storefront builder, order and inventory management, and Telegram integration for direct customer communication.
craftistry.goal: Give independent artisans a purpose-built platform that simplifies selling while offering practical tools for product management and customer outreach.
craftistry.solution: Implemented a drag-and-drop storefront builder, integrated the Telegram Bot API and Mini App for in-messenger storefronts, and designed an intuitive dashboard for managing inventory and orders.

problem_solving.description: Breaking complex problems into simple, efficient, and scalable logic. I don't just write code, I solve tasks.

user_focus.title: User-Centric Mindset
user_focus.description: Prioritizing accessibility and usability to create products that people actually love using.

reliability.title: Reliable & Scalable
reliability.description: Building robust systems that are easy to maintain, test, and grow over the long term.

treenity.name: Treenity LLC
treenity.description: Developed an interactive apartment configurator and Telegram MiniApps. Implemented complex UI interactions, smooth animations, and data-driven interfaces with Telegram API integration (bot and MiniApp).

kvarum.description: Developed an event management platform for speakers and attendees. Worked extensively with calendars, virtual lists, and real-time data loading via WebSockets.

sandvik.position: IT Infrastructure Manager / Inhouse Software Developer
sandvik.description: 12 years managing enterprise IT infrastructure, including experience leading a small team. Developed internal web applications for corporate data processing and reporting, bridging IT operations with business needs.
